Localization.Description: A SafeMobile Monitor agent is started on a device

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A SafeMobile Monitor agent is started on mobile device {datafield3} (SN: {datafield4}, IMEI: {datafield1}, UDID: {datafield2}, OS: {datafield6} {datafield5}) of user {subject.account.fullname} on host {event_src.host}
